title: Dekton 240pcs Chipboard Screw Kit - Assorted Sizes| Steel| Corrosion-Resistant| Ideal for Woodworking| Durable & Reliable| Includes Handy Storage Box| Easy Identification and Access
features: Comprehensive Size Variety: This versatile kit includes 240 high-quality chipboard screws in assorted sizes, catering to a wide range of woodworking and construction projects. Whether you're working on furniture assembly, cabinetry, or general repairs, you'll find the right size and length for the job.

High-Quality Steel Construction: Each screw is crafted from premium steel, ensuring superior strength and durability. The robust steel composition enhances the screws' performance and longevity, making them a reliable choice for both professional and DIY applications.

Corrosion-Resistant Design: Built to withstand challenging environments, these screws feature a corrosion-resistant coating. This protective layer helps prevent rust and degradation, ensuring that your screws maintain their integrity and appearance over time, even in damp or outdoor conditions.

Ideal for Woodworking: Designed specifically for chipboard and wood applications, these screws offer excellent holding power and stability. They are ideal for use in woodworking projects, including assembling wooden furniture, attaching panels, or securing components, providing a strong and reliable connection.

Durable & Reliable: The Dekton chipboard screws are engineered to deliver consistent performance and reliability. Their durable construction means they can handle heavy loads and resist stripping or snapping, ensuring a secure and long-lasting hold in various materials.
description: The Dekton 240pcs Chipboard Screw Kit is the ultimate solution for your woodworking and construction needs, offering a comprehensive assortment of high-quality screws in various sizes. Designed for versatility and durability, this kit is perfect for both DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople. Each screw is crafted from premium-grade steel, ensuring superior strength and reliability. The corrosion-resistant coating provides long-lasting performance, even in challenging environments, making these screws ideal for use in a variety of applications, from furniture assembly to cabinetry and beyond. This kit includes an impressive selection of chipboard screws in assorted sizes, catering to different project requirements and offering flexibility for various tasks. Whether you're working on a home improvement project, constructing wooden structures, or engaging in intricate woodworking, the Dekton screw kit provides the right fasteners for the job. The screws are designed to deliver a secure hold and consistent performance, ensuring that your projects stay intact and well-constructed. To keep your screws organized and easily accessible, the kit comes with a handy storage box. This compact and durable box features separate compartments for each screw size, making it simple to identify and retrieve the right fastener quickly. The clear lid allows for easy viewing of the contents, eliminating the need for time-consuming searches and streamlining your workflow.
